mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*)
FROM TBL_VOLUN_ACTIVITY VA LEFT JOIN TBL_ORGAN O ON VA.Volun_Act_Organ_No = O.Organ_No
1 = 1
AND VA.Volun_Act_Act_Type = #{volunActActType}
AND VA.Volun_Act_Age_Group = #{volunActAgeGroup}
AND SYSDATE BETWEEN VA.Volun_Act_Recru_Begin AND VA.Volun_Act_Recru_End
AND SYSDATE < VA.Volun_Act_Recru_Begin
AND SYSDATE > VA.Volun_Act_Recru_End
AND O.Organ_Name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{organization}, '%')
